mapper.select: SELECT bc.comment_id, bc.author_id, bc.content as comment, bc.created_at, m.name as authorName FROM board_comment bc INNER JOIN member m ON bc.author_id = m.member_id WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_comment(board_id, author_id, content) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{authorId}, #{comment})
mapper.update: UPDATE board_comment SET content = #{comment}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE board_comment SET is_deleted = TRUE, deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
